Legion (2010)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $40,168,080Details
International Box Office $27,479,494
Worldwide Box Office $67,647,574
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $19,806,029
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $6,031,424
Total $25,837,453
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$17,501,625 (43.6% of total gross)
Legs:2.30 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:59.4% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$26,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.6 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,476 opening theaters/2,476 max. theaters, 4.2 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $57,579,334

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: January 22nd, 2010 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
Video Release: May 11th, 2010 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for strong bloody violence, and language.
Running Time: 104 minutes
Plot point: Angels, Demons, Good vs. Evil, Possessed, Religious
Social setting: End of the World, Supernatural
Subgenre: Action Horror
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Fantasy
Production/Financing Companies: Screen Gems, Bold Films
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
